title: Hex's Tools-Umbrellas
description: A side mod for the Nycto Vampire Mod that introduces functional umbrellas designed to protect vampires from sunlight exposure.
body:
# **Hex's Tools-Umbrellas** (For Nycto's Vampires)

Hex's Tools-Umbrellas is a lightweight mod designed to work alongside Nycto's Vampires. It adds craftable umbrellas that protect vampires from sunlight when held in main or off hand.

Currently the mod has 9 umbrella varients:

![Black Umbrella](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34224ae218abff77dc8a15cdbaad2d6d2a604d78.png)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4000be3458606d6596c2c45d583a4a28c810dcf.png)

![Pink Umbrella](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6efc7fd30c3d6e312d86067bb9351618a8ab46d0.png)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836e07bc1292951fefabd8d34fa9cc45018d8977.png)

![Dreamy Umbrella](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4513ebaa9115617ff0a9b88c0242e9acdf40fc6.png)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b8c69560cb78ab548f6a59dafd883cd3ceafc9f.png)

![Leaf Umbrella](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7498a7fee851fbea5e367db03df9c48322081bd.png)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b0b568b9eb2879ae1798383bdee19a5610c2a96.png)

![Blood Umbrella](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c9962f5e68048e9f6c32b954479d11abe91ee29.png)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32092a0a7a2e28d240d6a7a305c049db2128e62f.png)

![Magma Umbrella](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4a26658cac8475f27092ae298bf44bece1efaf4.png)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c4ee7faef4c36415a2d1722a74ad9e219a28a0b.png)

![Danish Umbrella](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdc7514dbcaa8372cae5305c0b3d7f642b54d1e9.png)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2a28d24341a89979fdda36d6a272357e2b59899.png)

![Love Umbrella (Ostemads)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a56a81e09f711a7ff32fe1e400ca4495812f70af.png)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/698ccadd73a5ce6e15518780143c5455d1083894.png)

![Adeshi Umbrella](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e12320a752d420eccceda4e2189f74b87b11e47d.png)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d5cc9a6029b45f663757129b50288c78eb01476.png)

CREDITS: ostemad. for Textures (Discord) // okaka_sake for Textures (Discord)

Future updates may add durability, animations, or additional umbrella variants.

To report any bugs dm me on discord: hexaox
